CONTENT.Honours: Club BruggeBelgian Pro League: 2021–22, 2023–24Belgian Super Cup: 2022
CONTENT.Club career: Starting his career at Langhus, he moved to Stabæk's youth section at the age of 13. He signed his first professional contract with Stabæk in May 2020.He was given the chance to train with the senior team in early 2021, and subsequently given a new three-year contract in May that year. On 30 May 2021, he made his Eliteserien debut in against Rosenborg. On 27 June 2021, he scored his first goal for the club in a 4–1 defear against Bodø/Glimt. He made his full debut three days later, and scoring two goals against Viking FK.During the last transfer day of summer 2021, he signed a contract with Club Brugge. On 13 September 2022, he scored a goal in his Champions League debut in a 4–0 away win against Porto, becoming the youngest Norwegian player to feature, and the second youngest player of any nationality to score in the competition.
CONTENT.Personal life: Nusa was born in Norway to a Nigerian father and Norwegian mother.
CONTENT.External links: Antonio Nusa at the Club Brugge KN websiteAntonio Nusa at SoccerwayAntonio Nusa – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 4 August 2024As of match played 8 June 2024Scores and results list Norway's goal tally first, score column indicates score after each Nusa goal.
CONTENT.International career: Nusa was called up by the Norway U19s for the elite qualifying round for the 2023 UEFA European Under-19 Championship, and scored the winner in a 2–1 win over France in Orléans.In August 2023, Nusa received his first call-up to the Norway senior national team by head coach Ståle Solbakken, for a friendly match against Jordan and a UEFA Euro 2024 qualifying match against Georgia. He scored his first international goal for Norway in his debut match against Jordan.

SUMMARY: Antonio Eromonsele Nordby Nusa (born 17 April 2005) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays for Belgian Pro League club Club Brugge and the Norway national team.
